name: AllgoodServices (Website)

name: High Rices (MobileApp)
Responsibilities: Design and implement efficient RESTful APIs using Node.js to ensure seamless communication between the mobile app and backend services, enhancing performance and scalability.
Use MongoDB for effective data storage and retrieval, ensuring optimized queries and indexing for fast access to user data and app functionalities.
Implement robust security measures, including data encryption and secure authentication, to protect user information and maintain data integrity throughout the mobile application.

name: Learning Management System (Website)

Integrated MySQL for secure and efficient data storage, leveraging best practices in data encryption, access control, and optimization for high-performance queries.
Built and maintained robust APIs and data models with Next.js, ensuring smooth communication between frontend and backend, enhancing the system's scalability and reliability.
